title: Logistics Pipes
description: Logistics Pipes allows for distribution of items via pipes, more organised stockkeeping and automated crafting.
body:
![modrinth badge](https://badge.bernasss12.dev/modrinth/logistics-pipes/name) ![modrinth downloads badge](https://badge.bernasss12.dev/modrinth/logistics-pipes/downloads)

Logistics Pipes started as an extensive overhaul of the BuildCraft pipe system. It allows for better distribution of items via pipes, more organised stockkeeping and easier automated crafting. The mod provides many different pipes and modules to accomplish both basic and advanced logistics tasks.
